context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements referral attribution middleware and conversion processing including cookie settings, click tracking, fraud guards, status management, and the timing/format of reward fulfillment.

checklist.name: Cookie httpOnly flag
checklist.description: Cookie is set with httpOnly: true

checklist.name: Cookie duration
checklist.description: Cookie maxAge is set to 30 days expressed as 30 * 86400 * 1000 milliseconds (or equivalent numeric value 2592000000)

checklist.name: Click tracking
checklist.description: Middleware increments the click count in the database when a referral code is present in the request

checklist.name: Self-referral prevention
checklist.description: Attribution logic checks that the referral link's owner (customerId) is NOT the same as the ordering customer, and skips attribution if they match

checklist.name: Minimum order value check
checklist.description: Attribution skips (returns early) if the order subtotal is below the program's minimumOrderValue

checklist.name: One referral per email
checklist.description: Code checks for an existing conversion with the same refereeEmail AND programId combination and skips if one exists

checklist.name: Conversion pending status
checklist.description: Newly created conversion records are set to status 'pending' (not 'approved' or 'completed')

checklist.name: Referee reward immediate
checklist.description: Referee reward is granted synchronously (awaited) immediately when a conversion is recorded

checklist.name: Referrer reward delayed 7 days
checklist.description: Referrer reward is scheduled with a delay of 7 days (7 * 86400000 ms or 604800000 ms) via a queue, NOT granted immediately

checklist.name: Discount rewards single-use
checklist.description: When creating discount codes (percent_off or fixed_amount rewards), singleUse is set to true
